{{Quote|Commander Buzk sends his regards.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] before murdering [[Torino Kyber]]|<ref name="Boba Fett: Overkill">''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Troska''' was between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the forces of the [[Kyber Royal Family]].

==Background==
Many important oil refining plants lay on Troska, and tax rates on the oil were frequently disputed by the Imperials and [[King/Legends|King]] [[Natas Kyber]].
During a dispute between Imperial [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Sev Buzk|Buzk]] and [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Torino Kyber]] over the latest in a series of fuel blockades, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Treyz Manech|Manech]] secretly hired the bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to deal with the planet's rebellious Royal Family.

==The battle==
Boba Fett raided [[Refinery Six-Two-Two]] and destroyed much of the complex and defense. Fett pinned down the [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] of Troska, [[Torino Kyber]], in the ruins of the complex. The prince was killed. Upon finding out about Manech's deal with Fett, Commander Buzk scrambled [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] in an attempt to make it to the Kyber Palace before Fett did, but he was too late. Boba Fett made it to the palace, where the King offered Fett a large bribe in exchange for his life. Boba Fett fled on his [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces moved towards the Palace. [[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]] opened fire on the incoming forces, destroying many [[Reconnaissance Troop Transporter|RTTs]]. TIE squadrons flew in and opened fire on the palace, destroying the defenses. The Imperial forces took Kyber captive to interrogate him, and the deposition was a success.

==Aftermath==
After the battle, the Galactic Empire assumed control of the planet and its refineries. Due to his part in the battle, Manech was promoted to Sector [[Commander/Legends|Commander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]''
